data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation partial — 10 passed, 4 failed. The 4 approach-resolution config evals fail because the promptfooconfig.yaml prompt template (line 81) still teaches sprint context for the resolution loop instead of config-driven routing. The prior task (325e-41c2) added test cases but did not update the prompt template. SKILL.md changes are correct per AC; eval prompt template needs updating but is out of scope for this task.
